- [ ] Relevant automated tests pass.

## Safety and scope

- [ ] This change keeps LAN discovery and connection as the MVP's first goal.
- [ ] This change does not claim that remote connectivity or an Android APK is available.

## Documentation

- [ ] User-visible behavior is documented, or no documentation change is needed.
- [ ] English public documentation remains canonical, with matching Chinese content under `docs/zh-CN/` where applicable.
